title: pelargonium × wachendorfiae
intro: Pelargonium × wachendorfiae, also known as Wachendorfia or Fever Plant, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × wachendorfiae include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy. Pelargonium × wachendorfiae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and its essential oil is also extracted for use in aromatherapy and skincare products.
